underlying_goal: Commit and push changes to two repositories (LazyBlog and LZY-FE-JumpTrack) and create a reusable skill for this workflow
friction_detail: User interrupted requests twice, once at the start and once when testing the skill
brief_summary: User wanted to commit+push two repos and create a reusable skill with custom trigger keywords; commits and skill were created successfully, but skill test was interrupted.
